feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: The beat of your heart (And the beat of my wings)
entry.summary:
Author: Hubcap_Stealer_YumYum

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 31,444Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 38

Summary: Who knows? Maybe he’d even earn brownie points with the Batman for being able to take care of his precious city quickly.·˖✶𓆩🦇𓆪✶˖·˳.He wanted the Alien out of his city and he wanted him out NOW. Bruce Wayne, also known as the batman, watched over his city from above and violently repelled any intruders. That is, until a man with a blinding smile who can fly just as high as he can shows up, and a little boy who watched his parents die shortly after. TLDR: Bruce has bat wings and they attract the empathetic Kal'El, who helps him be a better person and father.

entry.title: Being part of the Kent-Wayne family isn’t so bad
entry.summary:
Author: PurpleButterfly19

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 29,607Chapters: 7/39Kudos: 109

Summary: It’s been three years since Dick and Kori got married, and many things have changed for the Kent-Wayne family. The family grew larger through more adoptions and also biological ties. New soulmates were discovered, more weddings were held, the Justice League can finally put a name to the man behind the cowl, and Wayne Manor will never look the same again. But the greatest change? Bruce Wayne and Clark Kent are officially engaged. This is the story of how they got there. As for Conner? He couldn’t be doing any better!

entry.title: The identity
entry.summary:
Author: Hejsan_Svejsan_Booo

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,362Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 12

Summary: Bruce had just left his maternity leave and now was needed for an off world mission. It was his first time being away from Stepfanie who he gave birth to eight months ago, he left Tim who was three, Cass and Jason. Dick manages to get himself on the mission as Nightwing and everything is going great until he gets struck by a de-age spell and Bruce now has to take care of his oldest baby who now is a baby. In the chaos Clark figures out who Batman is and is helping him take care of Dick. Playing parent with his crush does nothing to make his feelings go away and Clark realizes that he wants nothing more than to be with Bruce and his kids.

entry.title: one time, when it all goes wrong
entry.summary:
Author: Zuribat026

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 83,276Chapters: 13/?Kudos: 45

Summary: Beatrice is trying, all things considered. her family feels like it's breaking apart. Clark won't speak to her right now. and things keep happening around her.she needs to help everyone around her, the same way they need to help her.before they can't anymore. i don't own any of the characters and i don't give permission for AI to use my work

entry.title: Out of Line
entry.summary:
Author: Undercoverweirdo6967

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,891Chapters: 2/12Kudos: 21

Summary: Tim and Kon are secretly dating behind Bruce, and everyone's back. Once some hints and clues start dropping and eventually when Bruce starts picking up on it, drama and chaos unfolds. While Bruce is contemplating the new piece of information he just discovered, Clark Kent is getting awfully close to him. While all of this drama is going on, joker breaking out of Arkham is the cherry on top. Chaos and Smut unfold.

entry.title: Superman Gets So Gay Off That Pink Kryptonite
entry.summary:
Author: Mysterybugparade

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,878Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 26

Summary: Lex Luthor made pink kryptonite to try to hurt Superman, but it only makes him horny. Clark is so horny he cannot even move, so Bruce shows up and rescues him... Just one small problem, they have to have sex. This was mostly a joke, but I locked in for the smutt part. This is my first time writing MLM sex and smut, so I am sorry if this is not good. I am open to any suggestions and help!

entry.title: I'll Change For You
entry.summary:
Author: erzisnottonfire

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,462Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 31

Summary: Distantly, Bruce knew this was a bad idea that he was almost certainly going to regret.That thought was gone almost as soon as it came, however, as he stumbled outside the large doors of the gala venue with his phone in hand.OR: a heartbroken Bruce drinks a bit too much at a gala, and calls his ex to beg for another chance.This confuses Clark, who was pretty darn sure Bruce was the one that had broken up with him, but Bruce seems to believe the opposite.Will the World's Finest overcome their greatest obstacle: clear communication?Title and plot from I'll Change For You by Mitski

entry.title: red, white & boy scout blue
entry.summary:
Author: mitsukiris

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 44,038Chapters: 8/13Kudos: 131

Summary: 'Bruce chuckles, no ounce of amusement in it, “I believe perhaps you should consider switching to water, Kent.” “Should I?” Clark asks, batting his eyelashes at Bruce. “Why? Am I offending you? Sorry I’m not obsessed with you like everyone else. I know that must be confusing for you.” “You know what?” Bruce eyes him up and down. “I think you are.” Clark is frozen. He can’t move. He blinks a few times, slowly trying to digest the words. He can’t. And Bruce? Well, Bruce’s polite smile turns smug and almost a little mean.' or: Pulitzer winning journalist Clark Kent and playboy Bruce Wayne have to pretend to be friends after one sweet incident. What will happen when this fake friendship turns into a real one? What will happen when it turns into something more?

entry.title: Childish crushes
entry.summary:
Author: Cringe_Fella

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 73,916Chapters: 7/7Kudos: 1,734

Summary: Instead of lunging at him, the monster stumbled, as it tried to stand, and Clark saw as a child's leg slipped out of a big black boot before tangling in a yellow belt, small, very childish hands trying and failing to catch it. And maybe… And maybe it wasn't a monster at all, because as Clark watched, transfixed, the kid - because it had to be a kid, he didn't seem to be older than Clark- face planted on the floor without making even a single noise. _______ Or; a magical mishap accidently turns the World's Finest into an 8 and a 9 year old. Shenanigans ensue.

entry.title: Boundaries and ways not to cross them
entry.summary:
Author: morallywrong

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,101Chapters: 5/8Kudos: 224

Summary: Bruce had known all day what was coming at him. Like watching a car crash in slow motion, he was unable to do anything about the situation.---Bruce was a man of many faces and he took care of whom he showed which side of himself. When the Justice League gives him the ultimatum to reveal himself or leave the League, he leaves. If only Superman, the man he loved, had shown him support... Instead, the other hero couldn't even look him in the eye.

entry.summary:

entry.title: It's All Washing Over Me (I'm Angry Again)
entry.summary:
Author: crieslikeafool

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,188Chapters: 3/4Kudos: 68

Summary: He is trying to think about ways to make himself disappear as stealthy as he can when someone sits right next to him. He doesn’t remember crossing his arms on the wooden countertop and smushing his face between them, but he knows it’s not Alfred next to him.Dark blue slacks of opaque polyester, gray trainers, a leather messenger bag. It takes him way more than usual to connect the dots, but the second he does he snaps his head up, trying not to fall from his seat. “Oh, I’m sorry, didn’t mean to scare you.” Clark. ---or, 3+1, three Times Clark break Bruce's heart without knowing, and one time he doesn't.

entry.title: Power
entry.summary:
Author: ope-uh-oh (shortjacketlongskirt)

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 213,295Chapters: 40/?Kudos: 365

Summary: “Oh, you do like to flirt, don’t you?” Lex accused almost playfully, if not for the sharklike emptiness in his eyes. Bruce sat back as the appetizer plates were taken away and replaced with the entrée: filet mignon in a mushroom gravy, served with truffles, asparagus, and black garlic potatoes. He couldn’t help but think Clark would have appreciated this. And he desperately wished he was here with him rather than Vicki. He flashed a playful grin at Lex. “Flirting is what makes the world go round, Lex. What is that quote attributed to Oscar Wilde? ‘Everything in the world is about sex except sex, which is about power’. It applies to everything. Make people think you want them, and you’ve got the whole world in your hands.” After years of living in the closet, trying to ignore the truth, Bruce is finally cornered and is forced to come out in a very public way. This leads to a series of challenges, blending his public and private life in way he can’t escape.

entry.title: Do I Wanna Know?
entry.summary:
Author: Deluv_011

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 76,972Chapters: 13/?Kudos: 509

Summary: Damian Wayne and Conner Kent form an unexpected couple. However, few knew that behind that façade, each of them had their heart burning for someone else. Thus, Damian and Conner cling to each other as a distorted reflection of what they truly long for. Damian yearns for Jon Kent. Conner pines for Tim Drake. And the deeper they fall into that strange relationship, the more they begin to notice certain glances among their teammates… glances that reveal far more than mere friendship.

entry.title: vitals
entry.summary:
Author: apotelesma_stars

entry.title: Cantos of the Damned: A SuperBat Retelling of Dante's Inferno
entry.summary:
Author: EllEmmeFujo

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,600Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 3

Summary: A bet is placed. Batman is dead and finds himself in hell. With Constantine as his guide, he must find the person he treasures most and save them...even if it means damning himself to an eternity of fire and brimstone.
